title: prangos multicostata
intro: Prangos multicostata, also known as the Prangos fruit or Gao Ben Cao, is a traditional Chinese medicinal plant belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and analgesic effects, making it useful in treating conditions such as fever, pain, and inflammation. The health benefits of Prangos multicostata include its ability to improve digestion, reduce stress, and boost the immune system, as well as its potential to prevent cancer and cardiovascular disease. Prangos multicostata is often prepared in various herbal forms, including decoctions, infusions, and capsules, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
